purpose: Shared fixtures asserting that the TypeScript and Rust transcript normalizers produce identical visible output for the same input. Each case is consumed by desktop/frontend/src/lib/transcriptParity.test.ts and a matching Rust test in desktop-tauri/src/agents.rs.

cases.name: single_control_prompt_section_is_removed
cases.input:
Continue the existing desktop task.

Operator follow-up:
hello

Continue from the prior context. Do not repeat completed setup unless it is necessary.
